mapper.select: SELECT id, name, type, cron_expression, strategy_id, priority, status, number, last_time, total, org_id, company_id, adjust_basis, scope_type, description, bean_class, job_group, days, nums, standard, end_time, execution_time, out_temp_pj, is_use_report_rate, report_rate, is_use_first_control FROM ht_tasks WHERE org_id = #{orgId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ht_tasks SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ht_tasks SET last_time = NOW(), number = number + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(AVG(out_temp), 2) FROM ht_scope WHERE tasks_id = #{taskId}

SELECT s.id AS scope_id, s.meter_num, s.device_id, s.imei, s.meter_id, s.meter_arc_code, s.dtu_num, s.chan_num, s.org_id, s.company_id, ss.valve_angle, ss.instruction_id, ss.sort AS instruction_sort FROM ht_scope s INNER JOIN ht_strategy_sub ss ON ss.strategy_id = ( SELECT strategy_id FROM ht_tasks WHERE id = CAST(#{taskId} AS UNSIGNED) ) WHERE s.tasks_id = #{taskId} AND s.status NOT IN (9) ORDER BY s.id, ss.sort

SELECT s.id AS scope_id, s.meter_num, s.device_id, s.imei, s.meter_id, s.meter_arc_code, s.dtu_num, s.chan_num, s.org_id, s.company_id, ss.valve_angle, ss.instruction_id, ss.sort AS instruction_sort FROM ht_scope s INNER JOIN ht_strategy_sub ss ON ss.strategy_id = ( SELECT strategy_id FROM ht_tasks WHERE id = CAST(#{taskId} AS UNSIGNED) ) WHERE s.tasks_id = #{taskId} AND s.status NOT IN (9) GROUP BY s.unit_id ORDER BY s.id, ss.sort
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform ( id, instruction_id, group_id, strategy_id, command_index, orderr, instruction_type, instruction, number, intervall, fore_start, unit, duration, org_id, company_id, concentrator_code, device_id, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, instruction_status, send_time, tasks_id, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, imei, dtu_num, chan_num, out_temp_pj, ref_heat, create_by, create_time ) VALUES
( #{r.id}, #{r.instructionId}, #{r.groupId}, #{r.strategyId}, #{r.commandIndex}, #{r.orderr}, #{r.instructionType}, #{r.instruction}, #{r.number}, #{r.intervall}, #{r.foreStart}, #{r.unit}, #{r.duration}, #{r.orgId}, #{r.companyId}, #{r.concentratorCode}, #{r.deviceId}, #{r.meterNum}, #{r.meterId}, #{r.meterArcCode}, #{r.status}, #{r.instructionStatus}, #{r.sendTime}, #{r.tasksId}, #{r.inTemp}, #{r.outTemp}, #{r.roomTemp}, #{r.valveOpen}, #{r.imei}, #{r.dtuNum}, #{r.chanNum}, #{r.outTempPj}, #{r.refHeat}, #{r.createBy}, #{r.createTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ht_scope SET status = 9 WHERE tasks_id = #{taskId} AND status NOT IN (9)
UPDATE ht_scope SET status = 9 WHERE tasks_id = #{taskId} AND status NOT IN (9)
UPDATE ht_scope SET status = #{status} WHERE tasks_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE pr_heat_valve_archive a INNER JOIN ht_task_setting_log_item b ON b.meter_id = a.id SET a.valve_open = b.new_angle WHERE b.main_id = #{newMainId}
UPDATE pr_heat_unit_valve_archive a INNER JOIN ht_task_setting_log_item b ON b.meter_id = a.id SET a.valve_open = b.new_angle WHERE b.main_id = #{newMainId}
mapper.select: SELECT sd.chan_nums AS chanNum, ROUND(AVG(s.out_temp), 2) AS outTempPJ FROM ht_scope_dtu sd LEFT JOIN ht_scope s ON s.tasks_id = sd.tasks_id AND s.chan_num = sd.chan_nums WHERE sd.tasks_id = #{taskId} AND s.is_special != 1 GROUP BY sd.chan_nums
mapper.update: UPDATE ht_tasks SET number = number + 1, last_time = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{taskId} AS UNSIGNED)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform ( id, tasks_id, strategy_id, instruction_id, group_id, command_index, orderr, org_id, company_id, concentrator_code, meter_arc_code, dtu_num, chan_num, status, instruction_status, create_time, create_by ) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', '') AS id, sd.tasks_id, (SELECT strategy_id FROM ht_tasks WHERE id = CAST(sd.tasks_id AS UNSIGNED)) AS strategy_id, sp.instruction_id AS instruction_id, (SELECT cu_group_id FROM ht_tasks WHERE id = CAST(sd.tasks_id AS UNSIGNED)) AS group_id, #{commandIndex} AS command_index, sp.orderr AS orderr, sd.org_id, sd.company_id, sd.concentrator_code, sd.meter_arc_code, sd.dtu_num, sd.chan_nums AS chan_num, 0 AS status, 0 AS instruction_status, NOW() AS create_time, (SELECT create_by FROM ht_tasks WHERE id = CAST(sd.tasks_id AS UNSIGNED)) AS create_by FROM ht_scope_dtu sd INNER JOIN ht_strategy_perform sp ON sp.tasks_id = CAST(sd.tasks_id AS UNSIGNED) AND sp.command_index = #{commandIndex} WHERE sd.tasks_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FORMAT(SUM(b.out_temperature) / COUNT(*), 2) END AS average_temperature FROM ht_scope a LEFT JOIN pr_heat_valve_archive b ON b.id = a.meter_id LEFT JOIN pr_house h ON a.house_id = h.id WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.is_special = '0' AND h.pay_status = '1' AND b.out_temperature > 0

SELECT FORMAT(IFNULL(SUM(b.out_temperature), 0) / COUNT(*), 2) FROM ht_scope a LEFT JOIN pr_heat_unit_valve_archive b ON b.id = a.meter_id WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.is_special = 0 AND b.out_temperature > 0
mapper.update: UPDATE ht_scope s1 INNER JOIN pr_heat_valve_archive s2 ON s1.meter_id = s2.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT b.chan_num AS chanNum, ROUND(AVG(IFNULL(a.out_temperature, 0)), 2) AS outTempAvg FROM pr_heat_valve_archive a INNER JOIN ht_scope b ON a.id = b.meter_id WHERE b.tasks_id = #{tasksId} GROUP BY b.chan_num ) s3 ON s1.chan_num = s3.chanNum INNER JOIN ht_tasks s4 ON s1.tasks_id = s4.id INNER JOIN ht_strategy s5 ON s4.strategy_id = s5.id SET s1.status = CASE WHEN IFNULL(s2.out_temperature, 0) BETWEEN (s3.outTempAvg - IFNULL(s5.out_temp_deviation, 0)) AND (s3.outTempAvg + IFNULL(s5.out_temp_deviation, 0)) THEN 9 ELSE 0 END WHERE s1.tasks_id = #{tasksId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform_ls ( id, instruction_id, orderr, instruction_type, instruction, number, org_id, company_id, concentrator_code, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, instruction_status, send_time, tasks_id, alert_type, device_id, fore_start, imei, dtu_num, chan_num ) SELECT id, instruction_id, orderr, instruction_type, instruction, number, org_id, company_id, concentrator_code, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, instruction_status, send_time, tasks_id, alert_type, device_id, fore_start, imei, dtu_num, chan_num FROM ( SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', '') AS id, IFNULL(d.instruction_id, f.instruction_id) AS instruction_id, IFNULL(d.orderr, '0') AS orderr, IFNULL(d.instruction_type, f.type) AS instruction_type, IFNULL(d.instruction, f.instruction) AS instruction, IFNULL(d.number, '1') AS number, a.org_id, a.company_id, h.concentrator_code, a.meter_num, a.meter_id, a.meter_arc_code, IFNULL(d.status, '0') AS status, IFNULL(b.in_temp, '0') AS in_temp, IFNULL(b.out_temp, '0') AS out_temp, IFNULL(b.room_temp, '0') AS room_temp, IFNULL(b.valve_open, '0') AS valve_open, IFNULL(d.instruction_status, '0') AS instruction_status, NULL AS send_time, a.tasks_id, '0' AS alert_type, a.device_id, IFNULL(d.fore_start, '0') AS fore_start, a.imei, h.dtu_num, h.chan_num, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.meter_id ORDER BY d.create_time DESC, d.id ASC) AS rn FROM ht_scope a LEFT JOIN pr_house b ON b.id = a.house_id LEFT JOIN ht_tasks c ON c.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t1.* FROM ht_tasks_perform_last t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT meter_id, MAX(create_time) AS max_create_time FROM ht_tasks_perform_last WHERE tasks_id = #{tasksId} GROUP BY meter_id ) t2 ON t1.meter_id = t2.meter_id AND t1.create_time = t2.max_create_time WHERE t1.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND t1.id = ( SELECT MIN(id) FROM ht_tasks_perform_last t3 WHERE t3.meter_id = t1.meter_id AND t3.create_time = t1.create_time ) ) g ON g.meter_id = a.meter_id AND g.tasks_id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_tasks_perform_last d ON d.meter_id = a.meter_id AND d.tasks_id = a.tasks_id AND d.create_time = g.create_time LEFT JOIN ht_strategy_sub f ON f.strategy_id = c.strategy_id AND f.orderr = '1' LEFT JOIN pr_heat_valve_archive h ON h.id = a.meter_id WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND b.pay_status = '1' AND b.is_special = '0' ) ranked_records WHERE rn = 1

INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform_ls ( id, instruction_id, orderr, instruction_type, instruction, number, org_id, company_id, concentrator_code, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, instruction_status, send_time, tasks_id, alert_type, device_id, imei, dtu_num, chan_num ) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), IFNULL(d.instruction_id, f.instruction_id), IFNULL(d.orderr, '0'), IFNULL(d.instruction_type, f.type), IFNULL(d.instruction, f.instruction), IFNULL(d.number, '1'), a.org_id, a.company_id, h.concentrator_code, a.meter_num, a.meter_id, a.meter_arc_code, IFNULL(d.status, '0'), IFNULL(b.in_temp, '0'), IFNULL(b.out_temp, '0'), IFNULL(b.room_temp, '0'), IFNULL(h.actual_status, '0'), IFNULL(d.instruction_status, '0'), NULL, a.tasks_id, '0', a.device_id, a.imei, h.dtu_num, h.chan_num FROM ht_scope a LEFT JOIN pr_unit b ON b.id = a.unit_id LEFT JOIN ht_tasks c ON c.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(send_time) AS send_time, number, id, instruction_id, instruction_type, instruction, intervall, unit, duration, org_id, company_id, device_id, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, instruction_status, tasks_id, orderr FROM ht_tasks_perform_last WHERE tasks_id = #{tasksId} GROUP BY meter_id ) g ON g.meter_id = a.meter_id LEFT JOIN ht_tasks_perform_last d ON d.meter_id = a.meter_id AND d.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND d.send_time = g.send_time LEFT JOIN ht_strategy_sub f ON f.strategy_id = c.strategy_id AND f.orderr = '1' LEFT JOIN pr_heat_unit_valve_archive h ON h.id = a.meter_id WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND b.is_special = '0' GROUP BY a.meter_id
mapper.update: UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope d ON d.tasks_id = a.tasks_id AND d.meter_id = a.meter_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id SET a.alert_type = '9' WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.number > b.nums AND (a.alert_type = '0' OR a.alert_type = '1')

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope d ON d.tasks_id = a.tasks_id AND d.meter_id = a.meter_id LEFT JOIN ht_house_strategy c ON c.tasks_id = d.house_id SET a.alert_type = '4' WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.number <= b.nums AND ( ((c.out_temp + c.out_temp_deviation) < a.out_temp AND (a.valve_open - c.stride) < c.valve_min) OR ((c.out_temp - c.out_temp_deviation) > a.out_temp AND (a.valve_open + c.stride) > c.valve_max) ) AND (a.alert_type = '0' OR a.alert_type = '1')

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope d ON d.tasks_id = a.tasks_id AND d.meter_id = a.meter_id LEFT JOIN ht_house_strategy c ON c.tasks_id = d.house_id SET a.alert_type = '5' WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.number > b.nums AND ((c.out_temp + c.out_temp_deviation) < a.out_temp OR (c.out_temp - c.out_temp_deviation) > a.out_temp) AND (a.alert_type = '0' OR a.alert_type = '1')

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope d ON d.tasks_id = a.tasks_id AND d.meter_id = a.meter_id LEFT JOIN ht_house_strategy c ON c.tasks_id = d.house_id SET a.alert_type = '9' WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND (c.out_temp + c.out_temp_deviation) >= a.out_temp AND (c.out_temp - c.out_temp_deviation) <= a.out_temp AND (a.alert_type = '0' OR a.alert_type = '1')

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope d ON d.tasks_id = a.tasks_id AND d.meter_id = a.meter_id LEFT JOIN ht_house_strategy c ON c.tasks_id = d.house_id SET a.alert_type = '4' WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.number <= b.nums AND ( ((c.room_temp + c.room_temp_deviation) < a.room_temp AND (a.valve_open - c.stride) < c.valve_min) OR ((c.room_temp - c.room_temp_deviation) > a.room_temp AND (a.valve_open + c.stride) > c.valve_max) ) AND (a.alert_type = '0' OR a.alert_type = '1')

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope d ON d.tasks_id = a.tasks_id AND d.meter_id = a.meter_id LEFT JOIN ht_house_strategy c ON c.tasks_id = d.house_id SET a.alert_type = '5' WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.number > b.nums AND ((c.room_temp + c.room_temp_deviation) < a.room_temp OR (c.room_temp - c.room_temp_deviation) > a.room_temp) AND (a.alert_type = '0' OR a.alert_type = '1')

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope d ON d.tasks_id = a.tasks_id AND d.meter_id = a.meter_id LEFT JOIN ht_house_strategy c ON c.tasks_id = d.house_id SET a.alert_type = '9' WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND (c.room_temp + c.room_temp_deviation) >= a.room_temp AND (c.room_temp - c.room_temp_deviation) <= a.room_temp AND (a.alert_type = '0' OR a.alert_type = '1')

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope d ON d.tasks_id = a.tasks_id AND d.meter_id = a.meter_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id SET a.alert_type = '4', a.out_temp_pj = #{average} WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.number <= b.nums AND ( ((#{average} + c.out_temp_deviation) < a.out_temp AND (a.valve_open - c.stride) < c.valve_min) OR ((#{average} - c.out_temp_deviation) > a.out_temp AND (a.valve_open + c.stride) > c.valve_max) )

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope d ON d.tasks_id = a.tasks_id AND d.meter_id = a.meter_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id SET a.alert_type = '5', a.out_temp_pj = #{average} WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.number > b.nums AND ((#{average} + c.out_temp_deviation) < a.out_temp OR (#{average} - c.out_temp_deviation) > a.out_temp)

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope d ON d.tasks_id = a.tasks_id AND d.meter_id = a.meter_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id SET a.alert_type = '9' WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND (#{average} + c.out_temp_deviation) > a.out_temp AND (#{average} - c.out_temp_deviation) < a.out_temp
UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls SET number = IF(number < 127, number + 1, number) WHERE id = #{tasksId} AND (alert_type = '0' OR alert_type = '1')

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope e ON e.meter_id = a.meter_id AND e.tasks_id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN pr_house g ON g.id = e.house_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(orderr) AS orderr, strategy_id FROM ht_strategy_sub GROUP BY strategy_id ) f ON f.strategy_id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy_sub h ON h.strategy_id = b.strategy_id AND h.orderr = CASE WHEN b.number + 1 <= f.orderr THEN b.number + 1 WHEN f.orderr = 1 AND b.number + 1 > f.orderr THEN 1 ELSE MOD(b.number, f.orderr) + 1 END SET a.instruction_id = h.id, a.orderr = h.orderr, a.instruction_type = h.type, a.number = CASE WHEN f.orderr = h.orderr THEN a.number + 1 ELSE IFNULL(a.number, '0') END, a.fore_start = CASE WHEN f.orderr = h.orderr THEN '1' ELSE '0' END, a.intervall = h.intervall, a.unit = h.unit, a.duration = h.duration WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0'

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope e ON e.meter_id = a.meter_id AND e.tasks_id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN pr_house g ON g.id = e.house_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(orderr) AS orderr, strategy_id FROM ht_strategy_sub GROUP BY strategy_id ) f ON f.strategy_id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy_sub h ON h.strategy_id = b.strategy_id AND h.orderr = CASE WHEN b.number + 1 <= f.orderr THEN b.number + 1 WHEN f.orderr = 1 AND b.number + 1 > f.orderr THEN 1 ELSE MOD(b.number, f.orderr) + 1 END SET a.instruction_id = h.id, a.orderr = h.orderr, a.instruction_type = h.type, a.number = CASE WHEN f.orderr = h.orderr THEN a.number + 1 ELSE IFNULL(a.number, '0') END, a.fore_start = CASE WHEN f.orderr = h.orderr THEN '1' ELSE '0' END, a.intervall = h.intervall, a.unit = h.unit, a.duration = h.duration WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0'

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope e ON e.meter_id = a.meter_id AND e.tasks_id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN pr_house g ON g.id = e.house_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(orderr) AS orderr, strategy_id FROM ht_strategy_sub GROUP BY strategy_id ) f ON f.strategy_id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT strategy_id, COUNT(*) AS xcnt FROM ht_strategy_sub WHERE xunhuan = '0' GROUP BY strategy_id ) m ON m.strategy_id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy_sub h ON h.strategy_id = b.strategy_id AND h.orderr = CASE WHEN b.number + 1 <= f.orderr THEN b.number + 1 WHEN f.orderr = 1 AND b.number + 1 > f.orderr THEN 1 WHEN f.orderr > 1 AND b.number + 1 > f.orderr AND m.xcnt = 0 THEN MOD(b.number, f.orderr) + 1 WHEN f.orderr > 1 AND b.number + 1 > f.orderr AND m.xcnt = 1 THEN MOD(b.number, f.orderr) + 1 ELSE MOD(b.number, f.orderr) + 1 END SET a.instruction_id = h.id, a.orderr = h.orderr, a.instruction_type = h.type, a.number = CASE WHEN f.orderr = h.orderr THEN a.number + 1 ELSE IFNULL(a.number, '0') END, a.fore_start = CASE WHEN f.orderr = h.orderr THEN '1' ELSE '0' END, a.intervall = h.intervall, a.unit = h.unit, a.duration = h.duration WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0'

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope e ON e.meter_id = a.meter_id AND e.tasks_id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN pr_house g ON g.id = e.house_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(orderr) AS orderr, strategy_id FROM ht_strategy_sub GROUP BY strategy_id ) f ON f.strategy_id = c.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ht_strategy_sub WHERE orderr = '1' GROUP BY strategy_id ) d ON d.strategy_id = c.id SET a.instruction_id = d.id, a.orderr = d.orderr, a.instruction_type = d.type, a.instruction = d.instruction, a.number = CASE WHEN f.orderr = d.orderr THEN a.number + '1' ELSE IFNULL(a.number, '0') END, a.fore_start = CASE WHEN f.orderr = d.orderr THEN '1' ELSE '0' END, a.intervall = d.intervall, a.unit = d.unit, a.duration = d.duration WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0'

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope e ON e.meter_id = a.meter_id AND e.tasks_id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(orderr) AS orderr, strategy_id FROM ht_strategy_sub GROUP BY strategy_id ) f ON f.strategy_id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT strategy_id, COUNT(*) AS xcnt FROM ht_strategy_sub WHERE xunhuan = '0' GROUP BY strategy_id ) m ON m.strategy_id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy_sub h ON h.strategy_id = b.strategy_id AND h.orderr = CASE WHEN b.number + 1 <= f.orderr THEN b.number + 1 WHEN f.orderr = 1 AND b.number + 1 > f.orderr THEN 1 WHEN f.orderr > 1 AND b.number + 1 > f.orderr AND m.xcnt = 0 THEN MOD(b.number, f.orderr) + 1 WHEN f.orderr > 1 AND b.number + 1 > f.orderr AND m.xcnt = 1 THEN MOD(b.number, f.orderr) + 1 ELSE MOD(b.number, f.orderr) + 1 END SET a.instruction_id = h.id, a.orderr = h.orderr, a.instruction_type = h.type, a.instruction = h.instruction, a.number = CASE WHEN f.orderr = h.orderr THEN a.number + 1 ELSE IFNULL(a.number, '0') END, a.fore_start = CASE WHEN f.orderr = h.orderr THEN '1' ELSE '0' END, a.intervall = h.intervall, a.unit = h.unit, a.duration = h.duration, a.out_temp_pj = #{average} WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0' AND #{average} - c.out_temp_deviation > a.out_temp

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_scope e ON e.meter_id = a.meter_id AND e.tasks_id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(orderr) AS orderr, strategy_id FROM ht_strategy_sub GROUP BY strategy_id ) f ON f.strategy_id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT strategy_id, COUNT(*) AS xcnt FROM ht_strategy_sub WHERE xunhuan = '0' GROUP BY strategy_id ) m ON m.strategy_id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy_sub h ON h.strategy_id = b.strategy_id AND h.orderr = CASE WHEN b.number + 1 <= f.orderr THEN b.number + 1 WHEN f.orderr = 1 AND b.number + 1 > f.orderr THEN 1 WHEN f.orderr > 1 AND b.number + 1 > f.orderr AND m.xcnt = 0 THEN MOD(b.number, f.orderr) + 1 WHEN f.orderr > 1 AND b.number + 1 > f.orderr AND m.xcnt = 1 THEN MOD(b.number, f.orderr) + 1 ELSE MOD(b.number, f.orderr) + 1 END SET a.instruction_id = h.id, a.orderr = h.orderr, a.instruction_type = h.type, a.instruction = h.instruction, a.number = CASE WHEN f.orderr = h.orderr THEN a.number + 1 ELSE IFNULL(a.number, '0') END, a.fore_start = CASE WHEN f.orderr = h.orderr THEN '1' ELSE '0' END, a.intervall = h.intervall, a.unit = h.unit, a.duration = h.duration, a.out_temp_pj = #{average} WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0' AND #{average} + c.out_temp_deviation < a.out_temp

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id SET a.alert_type = '9', a.out_temp_pj = #{average} WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0' AND (#{average} + c.out_temp_deviation) >= a.out_temp AND (#{average} - c.out_temp_deviation) <= a.out_temp

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ht_strategy_sub WHERE orderr = '1' GROUP BY strategy_id ) d ON d.strategy_id = c.id SET a.instruction_id = d.id, a.orderr = d.orderr, a.instruction_type = d.type, a.instruction = d.instruction, a.number = IFNULL(a.number, '0'), a.fore_start = '0', a.intervall = d.intervall, a.unit = d.unit, a.duration = d.duration, a.out_temp_pj = #{average} WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0'

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id SET a.instruction = c.valve_max WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0' AND a.instruction > c.valve_max

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id SET a.instruction = c.valve_min WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0' AND a.instruction < c.valve_min

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id SET a.alert_type = '9' WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0' AND a.instruction = a.valve_open

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id SET a.instruction = IFNULL(c.valve_max, a.instruction) WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0' AND a.instruction > IFNULL(c.valve_max, a.instruction)

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id SET a.instruction = IFNULL(c.valve_max, a.instruction) WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0' AND a.instruction > IFNULL(c.valve_max, a.instruction)

UPDATE ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id SET a.instruction = IFNULL(c.valve_min, a.instruction) WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '0' AND a.instruction < IFNULL(c.valve_min, a.instruction)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ht_tasks_perform WHERE tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND status = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform ( id, instruction_id, instruction_type, instruction, number, intervall, unit, duration, org_id, company_id, concentrator_code, device_id, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, instruction_status, tasks_id, orderr, fore_start, create_time, create_by, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, imei, dtu_num, chan_num, out_temp_pj ) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), a.instruction_id, IFNULL(a.instruction_type, 3) AS instruction_type, IFNULL(a.instruction, c.valve_max) AS instruction, a.number, a.intervall, a.unit, a.duration, a.org_id, a.company_id, a.concentrator_code, a.device_id, a.meter_num, a.meter_id, a.meter_arc_code, '0', a.instruction_status, a.tasks_id, a.orderr, a.fore_start, NOW(), b.update_by, a.in_temp, a.out_temp, a.room_temp, a.valve_open, a.imei, a.dtu_num, a.chan_num, a.out_temp_pj FROM ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id LEFT JOIN ht_strategy c ON c.id = b.strategy_id WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId}

INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform ( id, instruction_id, instruction_type, instruction, number, intervall, unit, duration, org_id, company_id, concentrator_code, device_id, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, instruction_status, send_time, tasks_id, orderr, fore_start, create_time, create_by, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, imei, dtu_num, chan_num ) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), a.instruction_id, a.instruction_type, a.instruction, a.number, a.intervall, a.unit, a.duration, a.org_id, a.company_id, a.concentrator_code, a.device_id, a.meter_num, a.meter_id, a.meter_arc_code, '0', a.instruction_status, a.send_time, a.tasks_id, a.orderr, a.fore_start, NOW(), b.update_by, a.in_temp, a.out_temp, a.room_temp, a.valve_open, a.imei, a.dtu_num, a.chan_num FROM ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND (a.alert_type = '0' OR a.alert_type = '1')

INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform ( id, instruction_id, instruction_type, instruction, number, intervall, unit, duration, org_id, company_id, concentrator_code, device_id, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, instruction_status, send_time, tasks_id, orderr, fore_start, create_time, create_by, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, imei, dtu_num, chan_num ) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), a.instruction_id, a.instruction_type, a.instruction, a.number, a.intervall, a.unit, a.duration, a.org_id, a.company_id, a.concentrator_code, a.device_id, a.meter_num, a.meter_id, a.meter_arc_code, '0', a.instruction_status, a.send_time, a.tasks_id, a.orderr, a.fore_start, NOW(), b.update_by, a.in_temp, a.out_temp, a.room_temp, a.valve_open, a.imei, a.dtu_num, a.chan_num FROM ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type = '9'

INSERT INTO ht_alert (id, meter_id, alert_type, alert_time, org_id, company_id, valve, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), a.meter_id, a.alert_type, NOW(), a.org_id, a.company_id, a.valve_open, a.in_temp, a.out_temp, a.room_temp FROM ht_tasks_perform_ls a WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId} AND a.alert_type IN ('2', '3', '4', '5', '6')
mapper.update: UPDATE ht_scope a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks_perform_ls b ON b.meter_id = a.meter_id AND b.tasks_id = a.tasks_id SET a.status = IFNULL(b.alert_type, a.status) WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ht_tasks_perform_last ( id, instruction_id, instruction_type, instruction, number, intervall, unit, duration, org_id, company_id, concentrator_code, device_id, meter_num, meter_id, meter_arc_code, status, instruction_status, send_time, tasks_id, orderr, fore_start, create_time, create_by, in_temp, out_temp, room_temp, valve_open, imei, dtu_num, chan_num, out_temp_pj, cur_flow_compute, ref_heat, group_id, strategy_id, command_index ) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), a.instruction_id, a.instruction_type, a.instruction, a.number, a.intervall, a.unit, a.duration, a.org_id, a.company_id, a.concentrator_code, a.device_id, a.meter_num, a.meter_id, a.meter_arc_code, a.status, a.instruction_status, a.send_time, a.tasks_id, a.orderr, a.fore_start, NOW(), b.update_by, a.in_temp, a.out_temp, a.room_temp, a.valve_open, a.imei, a.dtu_num, a.chan_num, a.out_temp_pj, a.cur_flow_compute, a.ref_heat, b.cu_group_id, b.strategy_id, a.number FROM ht_tasks_perform_ls a LEFT JOIN ht_tasks b ON b.id = a.tasks_id WHERE a.tasks_id = #{tasksId}
